creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2006-10-08 16:09:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11/xcb-proto        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The X protocol C-language Binding (XCB) is a replacement for Xlib
  featuring a small footprint, latency hiding, direct access to the
  protocol, improved threading support, and extensibility.
  
  WWW: http://xcb.freedesktop.org/
  
  - Ashish Shukla
  wahjava@gmail.com
  
  PR:             ports/102446
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.624     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/x11/xcb-proto/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/xcb-proto/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/x11/xcb-proto/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/x11/xcb-proto/pkg-plist (new)
